title: Implement OMO-lite stage dispatcher and workflow status sync helper
summary: Add minimal executable helpers that turn the OMO-lite supervisor spec into reusable CLI tooling for slice stage dispatch and tracked status updates.
goal: Move Homecook OMO-lite from docs-only supervision into an executable phase with stage dispatch and workflow status synchronization helpers.

required_checks: pnpm exec vitest run tests/workflow-v2-docs.test.ts tests/omo-lite-config.test.ts tests/omo-lite-supervisor.test.ts
pnpm exec eslint scripts/omo-lite-dispatch-stage.mjs scripts/omo-lite-sync-status.mjs scripts/lib/omo-lite-supervisor.mjs tests/omo-lite-supervisor.test.ts
verify_commands: pnpm exec vitest run tests/workflow-v2-docs.test.ts tests/omo-lite-config.test.ts tests/omo-lite-supervisor.test.ts
pnpm exec eslint scripts/omo-lite-dispatch-stage.mjs scripts/omo-lite-sync-status.mjs scripts/lib/omo-lite-supervisor.mjs tests/omo-lite-supervisor.test.ts

out_of_scope: direct OMO agent execution from the dispatcher
automatic GitHub PR creation or merge actions
open_questions: When should the dispatcher start writing stage artifacts under .artifacts/omo-lite-dispatch/
Should product slices eventually expose a single-command supervisor path after more pilot data is collected?
